_readme: Live machine-readable snapshot for the agent team. The Orchestrator is the default sole writer. Other agents submit update envelopes in .agents/updates/ and append-only artifacts in .agents/sessions/ and .agents/gates/.
_state_write_policy: Normal path: non-orchestrator agents emit update envelopes; the Orchestrator merges them into STATE.json.

prompt_versions._note: Short SHA-256 hash of the normalized prompt file contents.

sprint.name: Sprint 1.0
sprint.goal: Ship core task creation and completion so users can manage a basic task list

core_stability._note: STABLE = safe to build against. IN_PROGRESS = feature agents should block.

features._note: Each feature entry tracks lifecycle, ownership, spec status, and any runtime bundle.

_statuses.BUILDING: In active development. Flag required if merged before ship readiness.
_statuses.VERIFIED: Passed FUNCTIONAL and any required verification.
_statuses.SHIP_READY: Polished, verified, and ready for release queue.

_spec_statuses.INTERVIEW_NEEDED: Spec interview not run yet. Do not assign a feature agent.
_spec_statuses.INTERVIEW_DONE: Interview complete, ACs drafted, awaiting human approval.
_spec_statuses.SPEC_APPROVED: Human approved spec. Feature agent may be assigned.

FLAGS.TASK_CREATION.description: Enables the task creation form and API endpoint

FLAGS.TASK_COMPLETION.description: Enables the task completion checkbox and status update API

items.description: Need a --color-input-border-error token. Used closest available (--color-border-danger) temporarily.

do_not_break.User.id: UUID format used in all API responses - changing type breaks all consumers
do_not_break.GET /api/tasks: Task list endpoint - relied on by task-creation and task-completion features

known_issues.description: Task title field accepts empty strings when whitespace-only input is submitted. Server-side validation exists but client-side trim is missing.
